subject: Tauros, a large muscular bull Pokémon charging on rocky terrain
description: A massive brown bull creature with multiple tails charges forward on rocky ground. Its horns are prominent and its muscular body is lowered in a charging posture. The setting is rocky and arid with a hint of sky at the upper edge. The motion is forceful and aggressive, conveying raw physical power.
foreground: large charging bull creature with multiple tails on rocky terrain
